topic: Myth: 'A Facebook page is the same as a website'
caption:
Facebook is rented space.
Your website is owned ground.
When the algorithm shifts, your site still works for you.
Stop depending on a platform you don't control.
DM us 'SITE' to get started.

#HighDesert #Victorville #Hesperia #AppleValley #SmallBusiness #WebDesign #SmallBusinessOwner #LocalSEO #VeteranOwned #WebsiteDesign #DigitalPresence #OwnYourBusiness #OnlineMarketing

copy.myth: A Facebook page is all I need online
copy.fact: You rent Facebook. You own your website.
copy.body: Facebook can change its rules or vanish overnight. Your website is yours. It builds trust and shows up on Google.
